title: Nanoparticles in cancer theragnostic and drug delivery: A comprehensive review

L2: Nanoparticle-based systems enable simultaneous cancer diagnosis and treatment
Gold, iron oxide, silica nanoparticles and liposomes offer distinct therapeutic advantages in oncology
L3: Comprehensive review of nanoparticle platforms for cancer theragnostics and drug delivery, examining gold, iron oxide, silica, quantum dots, carbon nanotubes, and liposomal systems for diagnostic imaging and targeted therapeutic delivery
